case_title: CHEN, MARIA vs. BAWANY, IMRAN, DBA LAN TREK et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS,COMPLAINT-UNLAWFUL DETAINER;CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MARIA SERVED DEC-20-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAWANY, IMRAN, DBA LAN TREK
